div.p: Constraint: RTT samples MUST NOT be measured for retransmitted segments.
Reason: Acknowledgement Ambiguity. We cannot distinguish if the ACK is for the original or the retransmission.
Condition: No outstanding data SND.UNA == SND.NXT Timer is disarmed.
Logic: RTO = SRTT + max(G, 4*RTTVAR) Armed for RTO seconds. Tracks oldest unacked segment.
